body:
## What changed

- moved the large inline Battlefield animation and responsive CSS block into `CardGame/frontend/src/styles/battlefield.css`
- moved the SkillBar flip-card CSS block into `CardGame/frontend/src/styles/skill-bar.css`
- updated `Battlefield.jsx` and `SkillBar.jsx` to import their extracted stylesheets
- kept the existing class names, keyframe names, and runtime behavior unchanged

## Why

These components were rendering large static `<style>` blocks inside React component render paths. Extracting them to CSS files keeps static styles out of the render tree and makes the files easier to maintain.

## Impact

- no intended gameplay or animation behavior changes
- `DamageFloat` and attack effect animations still resolve the same keyframe names through imported CSS
- style ownership is clearer for the two game components

## Validation

- there is currently no `lint` script in `CardGame/frontend/package.json`, so no frontend lint command was available to run
- ran `npm run build` in `CardGame/frontend`
- build produced CSS assets including `Battlefield-*.css` and completed chunk generation successfully
title: refactor(frontend): extract battlefield and skill bar styles
